security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: AST-level security inspector for AI coding agents
bundle.longDescription: Diff Drift inspects a git repository's drift against a selectable baseline — the last commit, the pinned trust point, a merge-base, or any rev — as a structured AST diff and live-flags security-relevant changes for review.
